Gamma activities were counted by means of a
shielded 76 cm3 high purity Ge detector with 1.7 keV
resolution at 1.33 MeV gamma-ray energy and a relative
Li-6 scintillation glass detector for neutron
The samples were pellets pressed from various Rb and
Br compounds of natural composition in diameter
between 6 and 12 mm and in thickness between 0.8 and
2.5 mm. Samples were sandwiched between 0.03 mm thick
